label: Transparent cherry blossom motif source
prompt:
Use case: photorealistic-natural
Asset type: Morphous transparent motif cutout source
Primary request: Create only a sakura branch, isolated full subject, no environment, no props, no text.
Subject: A delicate cherry blossom branch with pale pink flowers, small buds, bark brown twig structure, sky-white petal highlights, soft rose centers, and accurate botanical detail.
Composition/framing: centered complete cutout with generous padding; do not crop blossoms, buds, or branch tips.
Lighting/mood: clean studio light that preserves translucent petal softness, blossom centers, and bark texture.
Transparent workflow: place the subject on a perfectly flat solid #00ff00 chroma-key background for removal. The background must be one uniform color with no shadows, gradients, texture, reflections, floor plane, or lighting variation. Do not use #00ff00 anywhere in the subject.
Constraints: no text, no watermark, no vase, no grove scene, no decorative background, no second subject, no falling petals.

label: Light-mode design-system board
prompt:
Use case: ui-mockup
Asset type: Morphous light-mode design-system board
Primary request: Generate a comprehensive light-mode design-system board for a Morphous theme named "Morphous Cherry Blossom" derived from the visible transparent sakura branch cutout.
Reference use: This light design-system board is the source reference for coding any future theme. Extract palette, texture rhythm, contrast, spacing mood, and interaction language from pale pink petals, rose centers, bark brown branch lines, sky-white highlights, soft spring shadows, and small green buds in the visible sakura cutout.
Canvas: wide 16:9 board.
Resolution and legibility: high-resolution 4K-class source board, at least 2400px wide when available. Use large readable labels and avoid dense tiny text.
Required visible sections: Morphous Cherry Blossom, Sakura Branch, Palette, Typography, Japanese Typography, Components, Navigation, Dashboard, Forms, Table, Command/Search, Status, Texture, Radius, Spacing, Shadow, Tokens, Generated Assets.
Typography: include English and Japanese product UI examples; use labels like Geist, Noto Sans JP, Heading, Body, Label, Numeric.
UI coverage: buttons, inputs, select, textarea, checkbox, radio, switch, tabs, badges, alerts, cards, table rows, search command, sidebar navigation, dashboard metric cards, line/bar charts, empty/loading/error states, spacing, radius, border, shadow, texture samples.
Style/medium: premium shadcn/tweakcn-style social product system, realistic UI mockup, precise grid, 8px card radius, blossom-cloud surfaces, branch-line dividers, delicate spring rhythm.
Color palette: use only motif-derived colors plus near-neutrals from the motif: sakura pink, petal rose, bark brown, sky white, blossom cloud, spring bud, soft sky, branch ink.
Text: use short readable UI labels; avoid long paragraphs.
Constraints: no unrelated bright colors, no generic purple/blue gradients, no watermark, no random brand names, no misspelling of "Morphous Cherry Blossom" or "Sakura Branch".

label: Dark-mode design-system board
prompt:
Use case: ui-mockup
Asset type: Morphous dark-mode design-system board
Primary request: Generate a dark-mode version of the visible Morphous Cherry Blossom design-system board. It must feel like the same system translated to dark mode, not a new theme.
Reference use: Use the visible transparent sakura branch cutout and the visible light-mode Morphous Cherry Blossom board as references. The light and dark design-system boards are the source references for coding any future theme, so preserve palette roles, component language, blossom texture, branch dividers, spacing, Japanese typography, and shadcn/tweakcn component coverage.
Canvas: wide 16:9 board.
Resolution and legibility: high-resolution 4K-class source board, at least 2400px wide when available. Use large readable labels and avoid dense tiny text.
Required visible sections: Morphous Cherry Blossom, Sakura Branch, Dark Mode, Palette, Typography, Japanese Typography, Components, Navigation, Dashboard, Forms, Table, Command/Search, Status, Texture, Radius, Spacing, Shadow, Tokens, Generated Assets.
Visual details: dark background derived from branch ink and old branch, light text from sky white, primary accents from sakura pink, secondary accents from petal rose and bark brown, soft sky dividers, spring bud status, subtle blossom overlays, crisp shadcn-style cards and controls.
Typography: include English and Japanese examples; labels like Geist, Noto Sans JP, Heading, Body, Label, Numeric.
Text: use short readable UI labels; avoid long paragraphs.
Constraints: no neon colors, no unrelated saturated colors, no purple/blue gradients, no flat pure-black-only background, no illegible text, no random brand names, no misspelling of "Morphous Cherry Blossom".
